reviews.review_description: If you like ancient egypt theme, you should try it.

I love this game already.The mechanics are so good like lightning the cigarette and the gun reloading is nice too but most of all is it’s faithfulness to actually Egyptian mythology I can tell bugby studios did extensive research for this game.The voice was pretty bad but the gameplay completely overrules it I do wish there were more weapons and it does need a little bit more tweaking I am excited to see where this game goes

developer_response.body: Thank you for your compliments. We intend to release updates and your requests are being considered. Have fun in the unknown land!

reviews.review_description: It's a good idea, this game has a lot of potential and can be taken to another level through updates, I know that if it is given the work it deserves it can become among the best.

developer_response.body: thank you so much!! We are working on more updates! really appreciate you journeying through the unknown Lands!!

reviews.review_description: The visuals are top-notch and the art feels real. It’s like stepping into another world,transporting players into a realm that feels tangible and real. It’s clear that a lot of thought and effort has gone into creating this immersive experience. A must-play for all VR enthusiasts!

developer_response.body: Thank you! Appreciate you playing the Unknown Lands
